
```{r}
remove.packages("brfssTools")  # in a fresh R session
# Restart R again
# Extract zip to overlay your package directory
devtools::document()
devtools::install_local("C:/My Documents/R Projects/brfssTools",
                        quick = FALSE, build_vignettes = TRUE)
# (build_vignettes = TRUE so the new vignette ships installed)
# Restart R
library(brfssTools)
vignette("state-data-workflow")  # should now find it
```
